description:
This video introduces GSD, an open-source software framework for spec driven development, showcasing its unique approach to orchestrating sub-agents to complete projects. Unlike traditional methods, GSD enhances claude code workflows by allowing dynamic management of multiple claude code subagents. This makes ai agent integration seamless for robust software engineering projects.

I’ll show you exactly how to install GSD, map your existing codebase, and use it to build a fully functional Admin Dashboard with auth, credit management, and audit logs—all without manual intervention.

🚀 Sponsor: Automate your software testing with TestSprite (Free Trial): https://www.testsprite.com/?via=eric-tech

💬 Join the TestSprite Discord Community: https://discord.com/invite/GXWFjCe4an
